title: abrotanella nivigena
intro: Abrotanella nivigena, also known as Snow or Mountain Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abrotanella nivigena include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves being used to make a medicinal infusion that can be used to treat various health conditions.
